Results and Discussion
Quantification of Ketorolac Tromethamine
Quantification of KT was successfully performed by HPLC
analysis. As a result of the linearity study, a calibration line
was obtained by using the peak areas obtained in the analy-
sis of solutions of KT in PBS (pH 7.4) (0.3125-0.625-1.25-
2.5-5-10-20 µg/mL) by HPLC analysis. The calibration line
was  demonstrated  in  Fig.  2,  and  calibration  equation  was
y = 64.552x– 2.9713, and determination coefficient was R²
=  0.9999. Also,  precision  for  both  inter-day  and  intra-day
measurements across the three samples was less than 2%,
respectively. These results meet the criteria outlined in the
ICH guidelines [39]. LOD and LOQ were estimated to be
0.2723  µg/mL  and  0.8223  µg/mL,  respectively.  Results
were  similar  to  the  literature  [29]  and  applicable  to  the
determination of KT.
